title: Nirvanna the Band the Show and Movie will finally be available to stream via Hulu on July 24 - Engadget
summary: The cult hit Nirvanna the Band the Show the Movie will be available to stream via Hulu starting on July 24. Hulu is also the new home to the show that inspired the movie, Nirvanna the Band the Show .
